description_long: This is a large, rectangular industrial dumpster with a deep open-top design, constructed primarily from metal panels that show signs of weathering and rust. The exterior is painted in a faded blue-green color with streaks of black grime and corrosion, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. Reinforced vertical ribs run along the sides for structural strength, and the corners are squared off. On one short end, a prominent metal bar handle is mounted horizontally, likely for maneuvering or securing the dumpster. Small wheels are visible at the base, suggesting it can be rolled short distances. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, designed to hold large volumes of waste or debris.
description: A large, open-top metal dumpster with weathered blue-green paint, reinforced sides, and a prominent handle and wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open top, deep interior, and a horizontal metal handle on the front panel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, ribbed metal panels and small wheels at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid, reinforced back panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the ribbed metal construction and unobstructed open top.
attribute_handle_design: one horizontal bar handle, metal, located on the front panel
attribute_placement_location: outdoor commercial area, industrial site, or residential alley
